steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is ayllus, which is a plural noun. This grammatical fact determines what form the verb must take.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The verb must be plural to satisfy subject-verb agreement. Choice D, were, is the only plural verb form. Choices A, B, and C all provide singular verbs that would violate the agreement rule. That matches choice D — D is correct.
